# Bethanie United Football Club

> Bethanie United Football Club (nicknamed "The Crocodiles of Bethanie") is a community youth football club based in Bethanie village near Brits, in the Madibeng area of South Africa's North West Province. It serves young people from Bethanie and surrounding communities through structured football and youth development programmes. The club is a registered Non-Profit Company (NPC), incorporated with the CIPC on 4 June 2026, registration number 2026/444177/08.

## Teams & Programmes

- Teams: Under 11, Under 13, Under 15, Under 17, Under 19, Senior Team
- Football Development: structured coaching and competitive football across all six age groups
- Community Development: school football programmes, holiday soccer clinics, leadership development, anti-drug awareness campaigns, health and wellness initiatives
- Talent Development: player scouting, coaching clinics, referee development, football administration training
- Player Pathway: Local Associations (grassroots) → Regional Competitions (inter-club leagues, scouting) → Provincial Structures (coordinated development)

## Key Facts

- Founded / registered: 4 June 2026 (CIPC reg no. 2026/444177/08, Non-Profit Company)
- Nickname: The Crocodiles of Bethanie — mascot: Crocodile (Kwena)
- Colours: Purple and Gold
- Motto: Passion • Unity • Excellence
- Registered address: 10230 Otlotleng Section, Bethanie, Brits, North West, 0270, South Africa
- Vision: to become the leading football development institution in the North West Province, with clear pathways from grassroots to elite development
- Roadmap 2026–2046: Phase 1 (2026–2030) club structures, SAFA affiliation and sponsorships; Phase 2 (2031–2035) own training facility, women's football programme and regional league football; Phase 3 (2036–2046) full football academy, professional players and a recognised development centre

## Sponsorship

- Packages: Team Jersey sponsorship (prime logo placement), Match-Day Branding (banners, signage, announcements), Digital Campaigns (social media and website advertising)
- Sponsoring Bethanie United FC is a CSI / B-BBEE-friendly community investment: funds contribute directly to youth development, community empowerment, crime prevention, education support and grassroots sports
- Sponsorship contact: sponsorships@bethanieunitedfc.co.za

## Contact

- Phone: +27 12 001 8488
- General enquiries: info@bethanieunitedfc.co.za
- Sponsorships: sponsorships@bethanieunitedfc.co.za
- Administration: admin@bethanieunitedfc.co.za
- Secretary: secretary@bethanieunitedfc.co.za
- Chairman: chairman@bethanieunitedfc.co.za
